name: linConfigureResponseRange
title: linConfigureResponseRange
syntax: dword linConfigureResponseRange(byte[] frameIds, byte[] dlcs, byte[][8] responseData)
description: Configures a range of frames as response of a LIN node if no database is used.
This function may only be called in the event procedure on preStart.
All of the array parameters must contain the same number of elements.

parameters.name: frameIds
parameters.description: Array which contains the ids of every frame to be configured. Valid frame id range: 0..63

return: Returns 1 if the configuration of all given frames succeeded, otherwise 0.
